节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: bundle.
BundleFlag
ColorMode
GrantStatus
AbilityType
Indicates an unknown ability type
Indicates that the ability has a UI
Indicates that the ability does not have a UI
Indicates that the ability is used to provide data access services
AbilitySubType
DisplayOrientation
Indicates that the system automatically determines the display orientation
Indicates the landscape orientation
Indicates the portrait orientation
Indicates the page ability orientation is the same as that of the nearest ability in the stack
LaunchMode
Indicates that the ability has only one instance
Indicates that the ability can have multiple instances
BundleOptions
Indicates the user id
InstallErrorCode

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Want for starting the main ability of an application based on the given bundle name. The main ability of an application is the ability that has the #ACTION_HOME and #ENTITY_HOME Want filters set in the application's config.json file.
注释信息: @param { string } bundleName - Indicates the bundle name of the application.

parameters.说明: Indicates the bundle name of the application.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Want for starting the main ability of an application based on the given bundle name. The main ability of an application is the ability that has the #ACTION_HOME and #ENTITY_HOME Want filters set in the application's config.json file.
注释信息: @param { string } bundleName - Indicates the bundle name of the application.
@returns { Promise<Want> } Returns the Want for starting the application's main ability if any.

parameters.说明: Indicates the bundle name of the application.

节点.return_description: Returns the Want for starting the application's main ability if any.
